root_text.an4.131:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni honti, upapattipaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni honti, bhavapaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni honti.
root_text.an4.131:2.1: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni honti, upapattipaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni honti, bhavapaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni honti.
root_text.an4.131:3.1: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni honti, upapattipaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni honti, bhavapaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni honti.
root_text.an4.131:4.1: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni honti, upapattipaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni honti, bhavapaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni honti.
root_text.an4.131:5.1: Katamassa, bhikkhave, puggalassa orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni, upapattipaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni, bhavapaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni?
root_text.an4.131:5.3: Imassa kho, bhikkhave, puggalassa orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni, upapattipaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni, bhavapaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni.
root_text.an4.131:6.1: Katamassa, bhikkhave, puggalassa orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni, upapattipaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni, bhavapaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni?
root_text.an4.131:6.3: Imassa kho, bhikkhave, puggalassa orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni, upapattipaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni, bhavapaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni.
root_text.an4.131:7.1: Katamassa, bhikkhave, puggalassa orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni, upapattipaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni, bhavapaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni?
root_text.an4.131:7.3: Imassa kho, bhikkhave, puggalassa orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni, upapattipaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni, bhavapaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni appahīnāni.
root_text.an4.131:8.1: Katamassa, bhikkhave, puggalassa orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni, upapattipaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni, bhavapaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni?
root_text.an4.131:8.3: Imassa kho, bhikkhave, puggalassa orambhāgiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni, upapattipaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni, bhavapaṭilābhiyāni saṁyojanāni pahīnāni.
root_text.an4.131:8.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an4.131:1.1: “Mendicants, these four individuals are found in the world.
translation_text.an4.131:1.3: One individual hasn’t given up the lower fetters, the fetters for getting reborn, or the fetters for getting a continued existence.
translation_text.an4.131:2.1: One individual has given up the lower fetters, but not the fetters for getting reborn, or the fetters for getting a continued existence.
translation_text.an4.131:3.1: One individual has given up the lower fetters and the fetters for getting reborn, but not the fetters for getting a continued existence.
translation_text.an4.131:4.1: One individual has given up the lower fetters, the fetters for getting reborn, and the fetters for getting a continued existence.
translation_text.an4.131:5.1: What individual hasn’t given up the lower fetters, the fetters for getting reborn, or the fetters for getting a continued existence?
translation_text.an4.131:5.3: This is the individual who hasn’t given up the lower fetters, the fetters for getting reborn, or the fetters for getting a continued existence.
translation_text.an4.131:6.1: What individual has given up the lower fetters, but not the fetters for getting reborn, or the fetters for getting a continued existence?
translation_text.an4.131:6.2: One heading upstream, going to the Akaniṭṭha realm.
translation_text.an4.131:7.1: What individual has given up the lower fetters and the fetters for getting reborn, but not the fetters for getting a continued existence?
translation_text.an4.131:7.2: One extinguished between one life and the next.
translation_text.an4.131:8.1: What individual has given up the lower fetters, the fetters for getting reborn, and the fetters for getting a continued existence?
translation_text.an4.131:8.4: These are the four individuals found in the world.”
